details: AdminLoginGate now attempts Cloudflare server auth first.
Cloudflare ADMIN_ID and ADMIN_PASSWORD secrets were uploaded.
POST /api/admin/login issues an HttpOnly session cookie.
GET /api/admin/session with cookie returned authenticated true.
Admin notice create/update/hide/delete now uses server API when serverAuth is true.
Public notice pages now request /api/public/notices on mount.
Live smoke created, updated, exposed, hid, verified public removal, and deleted a D1 smoke notice.
Worker validates JPG/PNG/WEBP and 10MB limit server-side.
Admin image upload/replace uses /api/admin/images and R2 when serverAuth is true.
Live smoke uploaded a PNG to R2 and read it back through /api/cms/media/*.
R2 delete/replace old-object cleanup remains HOLD.

commandsRun.d1Migrations: PASS: wrangler d1 migrations apply dgtc_content --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
commandsRun.secrets: PASS: wrangler secret put ADMIN_ID / ADMIN_PASSWORD
commandsRun.apiSmoke: PASS: auth/session/D1 notice CRUD/public reflection/R2 upload/logout
commandsRun.browserSmoke: PASS: home, notice, admin login at 390 and 1440; console error 0; overflow 0

remainingHold: R2 old object deletion and media lifecycle cleanup
Server persistence for popup/menu/footer/settings/SEO/users/backups beyond existing scaffold
Role-based authorization and real admin user table
Password hash secret rotation from plaintext ADMIN_PASSWORD to ADMIN_PASSWORD_SHA256
Rate limiting and lockout for login attempts
Owner real-device UI confirmation for deployed visual changes
Pre-existing dirty UI hardening files need separate git resolution if not already committed
